doc: Declarative spec. Replace <placeholders> and RUN. MCP paths: ../../../../_framework/porter-mcp-calls.md
engine: llm-inferred — NO process.py. Only the data pull below is deterministic; inferring the scheme, the grammar, the controlled vocabulary and the coherence rules is the LLM's, fresh each run.

optional_input.account_profile: if structure-map already produced it, load it and start from its decoded grammar/lexicons; the queries then only confirm the current names. See ../../../../_framework/account-profile.md

queries.why: COMPLETE campaign name set (includes Demand Gen / PMax without keywords). type + bidding ride along to validate those slots.
ad-group names joined to their campaign + real match type (Search) to validate the Match slot

llm_step: Over the UNIQUE campaign + ad-group names: (1) infer the account's dominant scheme at both levels; (2) synthesize one grammar per level; (3) build the controlled vocabulary, canonicalizing variants; (4) write the coherence rules binding ad group to campaign; (5) send unresolved internal codes to needs_dictionary. Validate type/match/bidding tokens against the real dimensions in the rows.
output: see references/output.md — the convention spec (the insumo)
